Fairy Villages - every photo from your catalog

These are all 12 images I extracted from the print catalog's Fairy Villages section. Each has an id (fv00 etc.) and its Shopify CDN filename. Tell me, by id, which photo goes on each of the 5 gallery cards, plus the hero and the Mushroom feature. Example reply: "Pink Blossom = fv02, Lilac = fv03, Rainbow Shimmer = fv04, Rainbow Home = fv06, Butterfly = fv05, hero = fv11, Mushroom = fv00".
